notarycafe.description: NotaryCafe.com - notary listing and networking platform

message_templates.subject: Notary services inquiry
message_templates.body:
Hello,

I came across your profile on Notary Cafe. I'm a notary public looking to connect with other notaries in the area for potential referrals and collaboration.

Would you be open to connecting? I'd love to discuss how we can support each other's notary business.

Best regards,
Jeffery

message_templates.subject: Collaboration opportunity
message_templates.body:
Hi there,

I saw your listing on Notary Cafe and wanted to reach out. I'm looking to expand my network of notaries for client referrals.

If you're interested in collaborating or know someone who might be, I'd love to hear from you.

Thanks,
Jeffery

notaryjane.description: NotaryJane.com - notary directory and marketing platform

rotary.description: Rotary club email outreach via contacts scraped from OSM/club directories

message_templates.subject: Quick question about notary services
message_templates.body:
Hi {name},

I hope you're having a good week. I'm looking for a notary public to help with some tax-related documents I need to finalize.

Could you let me know if your club offers notary services or if you can point me in the right direction? I'd appreciate any details on availability and fees.

Thanks for your time.

Best regards,
Jeffery Wong Chen.
wongchenjeffery@gmail.com
+1 218-433-6343

message_templates.subject: Notary help needed
message_templates.body:
Dear {name},

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out because I need a notary public to notarize some documents for my tax filing.

Do you know if any members in your club provide notary services? I'd love to hear about availability and what the process looks like.

Thank you and looking forward to your reply.

Kind regards,
Jeffery Wong Chen.
wongchenjeffery@gmail.com
+1 218-433-6343

message_templates.subject: Inquiry about notary services
message_templates.body:
Hello {name},

I hope you're doing well. I'm writing to ask about notary services — I have some paperwork that needs to be notarized for my taxes.

Would you be able to help or refer me to someone who can? Please let me know about your availability and any applicable charges.

Thank you very much.

Warm regards,
Jeffery Wong Chen.
wongchenjeffery@gmail.com
+1 218-433-6343
